CustomField.formula:
IF( YEAR( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c )= YEAR( TODAY() ) ,
(Total_Incremental_Margin__c /365)* (365-(365-DAYOFYEAR( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c ))),
IF( YEAR( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c )> YEAR( TODAY() ) ,
( Total_Incremental_Margin__c /365)* (365-DAYOFYEAR( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c )),
0))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows the estimated portion of Gross Margin to be recognized NEXT year based on start date
CustomField.label: CORE Margin - Recognized NEXT Year
